case_title: CALIFORNIA MINI BUS, INC. et al vs. WELAND, RONALD A.

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF APR-04-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-04-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1996 CONTINUED FROM APR-04-1996 TO MAY-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1996, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-05-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PLAINTIFF: DEFT. RONALD A WELAND WAS PRESENT IN COURT ON 3/5/96 BUT HAS NOT APPEARED IN THE ACTION. PLAINTIFF IS TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR APR-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
